title: Hyalosema cominsii
taxonomy: Hyalosema cominsii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and is native to China. Within the Fabaceae family, Hyalosema cominsii is placed in the tribe Millettieae, which includes other legume species. The genus Hyalosema is a small one, with only a few species known to date. Further classification of Hyalosema cominsii may include the order Fabales and the class Magnoliopsida.
